GKI Ketosis Calculator v0.2

Vibed with Shakespeare

Calculate GKI

Enter your blood glucose and ketone values. Default glucose unit is mg/dL.

History & Chart

    About GKI

    The Glucose Ketone Index (GKI) compares blood glucose and ketone levels to estimate how deeply your body is running on fat vs sugar. Lower GKI values indicate deeper ketosis.

    Formula: GKI = (Glucose (mg/dL) ÷ 18) × Ketones (mmol/L)

    GKIKetosis LevelMeaning
    <1Extreme KetosisUsed in medical therapies
    1–3Deep KetosisStrong fat-burning
    3–6Nutritional KetosisIdeal for fat loss & metabolic health
    6–9Light KetosisMild fat-burning
    >9No KetosisBody running on sugar

    How to lower GKI: cut carbs, fast longer, exercise, eat healthy fats. Aim for GKI <6 for fat loss, <3 for deeper ketosis.

    GKI Ketosis Calculator • Offline PWA • Built with care
